---
title: q.data Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here. Completed items are removed.

## Planned

No module-specific work is currently committed.

## Ideas

These candidates fit `q.data`, but are not yet committed roadmap items.

- [ ] `q.data.sources.fred` — macroeconomic series with release-date and
  vintage-aware handling
- [ ] `q.data.sources.fama_french` — normalized factor datasets with explicit
  units and source metadata
